verdict.answer_first: A wins: sentence 1 gives the plan immediately: “verify → persist raw → ack fast → process async… reconciliation job”; B starts with framing: “Good problem to get right.”
verdict.decisiveness: A wins: it states “The reliable pattern is…” as one prescription; B adds more sections and asks for “provider/stack/volume,” which dilutes the call.
verdict.fabrication: none; both use general webhook facts and do not fabricate provider-specific numbers.
verdict.actionability: A wins: numbered receive/worker/backstop sequence is directly executable, especially “Return 2xx the moment it's durably stored” and “Run a periodic reconciliation job.”
